requirements.title: Modular, Extensible Project Architecture
evidence: pipeline, simulator, technical-factor, Codex-intelligence, replay, gate, server, and frontend modules are separated.
architecture report is present for future large-project expansion.

requirements.title: Codex-Normalized Intelligence Layer
evidence: Codex workflow includes source candidate audits, packet preflight, source logs, evidence quality, conflict checks, and factor contracts.
residual_risks: Formal edge blocker: 3 source snapshots still lack cutoff-valid archive proof.
Formal edge candidate queue: 14 replacement candidates are catalogued; 0 currently have cutoff-valid proof.
Formal edge blocker: 3 events still have weak/review-required evidence quality rows.
next_actions: Attach cutoff-valid archive proof for verified replacement candidates, snapshot them into source_log.json, then rerun source audit and readiness.

requirements.title: News and Facts to Simulation Factors
residual_risks: The routing contract is proven on diagnostic British GP packets and smoke fixtures, not yet on a large held-out season corpus.
next_actions: Run a matched no-Codex and Codex-factor ablation after source and market inputs are frozen.

requirements.title: Multi-Round Simulation and Probability Outputs
residual_risks: Probability calibration is diagnostic-only and small-sample.
Simulator parameter ranking is diagnostic-only until rerun as a held-out matched ablation.
next_actions: Review simulator-calibration candidates, then run matched held-out simulator ablations after source and market inputs are frozen.

requirements.title: Market Gap Analysis Without Trade Execution
evidence: Project compares model probabilities against market snapshots; no execution workflow is part of the MVP.
residual_risks: Formal edge blocker: 6 completed replay events still lack usable same-time model-supported market snapshots.
next_actions: Backfill reviewed market definitions and cutoff-valid CLOB price history before making formal edge or CLV claims.

requirements.title: Chronological Replay and Problem Analysis
next_actions: P1 Backfill Same-Time Market Snapshots: blocked_no_usable_market_definitions
P2 Replace or Prove Retrospective Sources: replacement_sources_required
P3 Regenerate Formal Replay Freeze: blocked_by_input_readiness

requirements.title: Frontend Inspection Dashboard
evidence: Dashboard exposes event map, official track asset audit, simulation replay, packet/preflight, market gap, replay analysis, MVP gate, calibration, and freeze panels.

requirements.title: Codex Factor Impact Diagnostics
residual_risks: Current evidence proves Codex factors are routed and move simulated probabilities; it does not yet prove positive lift versus a locked no-Codex baseline.
Formal positive-help claims require matched ablations after input archives and market snapshots are frozen.
next_actions: Add a no-Codex replay ablation and a Codex-factor-only ablation on the same replay freeze.
Promote the result only if source, market, seeds, and simulator config are locked.

requirements.title: Formal Edge Boundary
evidence: The MVP is explicitly diagnostic; stable edge, CLV, and trade execution are not claimed.
next_actions: P1 Backfill Same-Time Market Snapshots: blocked_no_usable_market_definitions
P2 Replace or Prove Retrospective Sources: replacement_sources_required
P3 Regenerate Formal Replay Freeze: blocked_by_input_readiness
